verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ حمٓ
verses.text: Ḥā Mīm.

verses.quran_arabic: عٓسٓقٓ
verses.text: ‘Ayn Sīn Qāf.

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ يُوحِىٓ إِلَيْكَ وَإِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِكَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: In this way He inspires you, and those who were before you – God, the Mighty, the Wise.

canonical_variants.arabic: حمٓ عٓسٓقٓۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُوحَيٰ إِلَيۡكَ وَإِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِكَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ
canonical_variants.english: Thus it is revealed to you and to those before you: Allah the Almighty, the All-Wise— 4 to Him belongs . . .

canonical_variants.arabic: حمٓۚ عٓسٓقٓۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُوحَيٰ إِلَيۡكَ وَإِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِكَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ
canonical_variants.english: Thus it is revealed to you and to those before you: Allah the Almighty, the All-Wise— 4 to Him belongs . . .

verses.quran_arabic: لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَلِىُّ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verses.text: To Him (belongs) whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. He is the Most High, the Almighty.

verses.quran_arabic: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرْنَ مِن فَوْقِهِنَّ ۚ وَٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ يُسَبِّحُونَ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّهِمْ وَيَسْتَغْفِرُونَ لِمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ أَلَآ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: The heavens are nearly torn apart from above, when the angels glorify their Lord with praise, and ask forgiveness for those on the earth. Is it not a fact that God – He is the Forgiving, the Compassionate?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ تَكَادُ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتُ يَنفَطِرۡنَ مِن فَوۡقِهِنَّۚ وَاَلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ يُسَبِّحُونَ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَيَسۡتَغۡفِرُونَ لِمَن فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِۗ أَلَآ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ هُوَ اَ۬لۡغَفُورُ اُ۬لرَّحِيمُ
canonical_variants.english: The heavens almost split apart from above them . . .

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ تَكَادُ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتُ يَنفَطِرۡنَ مِن فَوۡقِهِنَّۚ  وَاَلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ يُسَبِّحُونَ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَيَسۡتَغۡفِرُونَ لِمَن فِي  اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِۗ أَلَا إِنَّ اَ۬للَّه هُّوَ اَ۬لۡغَفُورُ اُ۬لرَّحِيمُ
canonical_variants.english: The heavens almost split apart from above them . . .

canonical_variants.arabic: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ يَنفَطِرۡنَ مِن فَوۡقِهِنَّۚ وَٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ يُسَبِّحُونَ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَيَسۡتَغۡفِرُونَ لِمَن فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۗ أَلَآ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلۡغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
canonical_variants.english: The heavens almost split apart from above them . . .

canonical_variants.arabic: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرۡنَ مِن فَوۡقِهِنَّۚ وَٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ يُسَبِّحُونَ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَيَسۡتَغۡفِرُونَ لِمَن فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۗ أَلَآ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلۡغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
canonical_variants.english: The heavens almost splinter from above them, while the angels exalt their Lord with praise and ask forgiveness for those on earth. Undoubtedly, Allah is indeed the Oft-Forgiving, the Bestower of mercy.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ ٱللَّهُ حَفِيظٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِوَكِيلٍۢ
verses.text: Those who have taken allies other than Him – God is watcher over them. You are not a guardian over them.

verses.quran_arabic: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْكَ قُرْءَانًا عَرَبِيًّۭا لِّتُنذِرَ أُمَّ ٱلْقُرَىٰ وَمَنْ حَوْلَهَا وَتُنذِرَ يَوْمَ ٱلْجَمْعِ لَا رَيْبَ فِيهِ ۚ فَرِيقٌۭ فِى ٱلْجَنَّةِ وَفَرِيقٌۭ فِى ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.text: In this way We have inspired you (with) an Arabic Qur’ān, so that you may warn the Mother of Towns and those around it, and so that you may warn of the Day of Gathering – (there is) no doubt about it – (one) group in the Garden, and (another) group in the blazing (Fire).

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ لَجَعَلَهُمْ أُمَّةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ وَلَٰكِن يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ وَٱلظَّٰلِمُونَ مَا لَهُم مِّن وَلِىٍّۢ وَلَا نَصِيرٍ
verses.text: If God had (so) pleased, He would indeed will have made them one community. But He causes whomever He pleases to enter into His mercy. The evildoers will have no ally and no helper.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ ۖ فَٱللَّهُ هُوَ ٱلْوَلِىُّ وَهُوَ يُحْىِ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌۭ
verses.text: Or have they taken allies other than Him? God – He is the (true) Ally. He gives the dead life. He is powerful over everything.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا ٱخْتَلَفْتُمْ فِيهِ مِن شَىْءٍۢ فَحُكْمُهُۥٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ رَبِّى عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَإِلَيْهِ أُنِيبُ
verses.text: Whatever you differ about, judgment of it (belongs) to God. That is God, my Lord. In Him I have put my trust, and to Him I turn (in repentance).

verses.quran_arabic: فَاطِرُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ جَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَزْوَٰجًۭا وَمِنَ ٱلْأَنْعَٰمِ أَزْوَٰجًۭا ۖ يَذْرَؤُكُمْ فِيهِ ۚ لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِۦ شَىْءٌۭ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْبَصِيرُ
verses.text: (He is) the Creator of the heavens and the earth. He has made pairs for you from yourselves, and pairs (also) from the livestock. He scatters you by this means. There is nothing like Him. He is the Hearing, the Seeing.

verses.quran_arabic: لَهُۥ مَقَالِيدُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ يَبْسُطُ ٱلرِّزْقَ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَقْدِرُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: To Him (belong) the keys of the heavens and the earth. He extends (His) provision to whomever He pleases, and restricts (it). Surely He has knowledge of everything.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ شَرَعَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلدِّينِ مَا وَصَّىٰ بِهِۦ نُوحًۭا وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْكَ وَمَا وَصَّيْنَا بِهِۦٓ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَمُوسَىٰ وَعِيسَىٰٓ ۖ أَنْ أَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلدِّينَ وَلَا تَتَفَرَّقُوا۟ فِيهِ ۚ كَبُرَ عَلَى ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ مَا تَدْعُوهُمْ إِلَيْهِ ۚ ٱللَّهُ يَجْتَبِىٓ إِلَيْهِ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهْدِىٓ إِلَيْهِ مَن يُنِيبُ
verses.text: He has instituted for you from the religion what He charged Noah with, and that which We have inspired you (with), and what We charged Abraham, and Moses, and Jesus with: ‘Observe the religion, and do not become divided in it.’ What you call them to is hard on the idolaters. God chooses for Himself whomever He pleases, and He guides to Himself whoever turns (to Him in repentance).

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا تَفَرَّقُوٓا۟ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَهُمُ ٱلْعِلْمُ بَغْيًۢا بَيْنَهُمْ ۚ وَلَوْلَا كَلِمَةٌۭ سَبَقَتْ مِن رَّبِّكَ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍۢ مُّسَمًّۭى لَّقُضِىَ بَيْنَهُمْ ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أُورِثُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ لَفِى شَكٍّۢ مِّنْهُ مُرِيبٍۢ
verses.text: They did not become divided until after the knowledge had come to them, (because of) envy among themselves. Were it not for a preceding word from your Lord, until an appointed time, it would indeed have been decided between them. Surely those who inherited the Book after them are in grave doubt indeed about it.

verses.quran_arabic: فَلِذَٰلِكَ فَٱدْعُ ۖ وَٱسْتَقِمْ كَمَآ أُمِرْتَ ۖ وَلَا تَتَّبِعْ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ ۖ وَقُلْ ءَامَنتُ بِمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ مِن كِتَٰبٍۢ ۖ وَأُمِرْتُ لِأَعْدِلَ بَيْنَكُمُ ۖ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّنَا وَرَبُّكُمْ ۖ لَنَآ أَعْمَٰلُنَا وَلَكُمْ أَعْمَٰلُكُمْ ۖ لَا حُجَّةَ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكُمُ ۖ ٱللَّهُ يَجْمَعُ بَيْنَنَا ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: So call (them) to that, and go straight as you have been commanded, and do not follow their (vain) desires, but say: ‘I believe in whatever Book God has sent down, and I have been commanded to act fairly among you. God is our Lord and your Lord. To us our deeds and to you your deeds. (There is) no argument between us and you. God will gather us together. To Him is the (final) destination.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُحَآجُّونَ فِى ٱللَّهِ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا ٱسْتُجِيبَ لَهُۥ حُجَّتُهُمْ دَاحِضَةٌ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ وَعَلَيْهِمْ غَضَبٌۭ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌۭ شَدِيدٌ
verses.text: Those who (still) argue about God, after whatever response has been made to Him – their argument is refuted in the sight of their Lord. Anger (will fall) on them, and for them (there will be) a harsh punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنزَلَ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَٱلْمِيزَانَ ۗ وَمَا يُدْرِيكَ لَعَلَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ قَرِيبٌۭ
verses.text: (It is) God who has sent down the Book with the truth, and (also) the scale. What will make you know? Perhaps the Hour is near.

verses.quran_arabic: يَسْتَعْجِلُ بِهَا ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهَا ۖ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مُشْفِقُونَ مِنْهَا وَيَعْلَمُونَ أَنَّهَا ٱلْحَقُّ ۗ أَلَآ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُمَارُونَ فِى ٱلسَّاعَةِ لَفِى ضَلَٰلٍۭ بَعِيدٍ
verses.text: Those who do not believe in it seek to hurry it, but those who believe in it are apprehensive about it, and know that it is the truth. Is it not a fact that those who are in doubt about the Hour are far astray?

verses.quran_arabic: ٱللَّهُ لَطِيفٌۢ بِعِبَادِهِۦ يَرْزُقُ مَن يَشَآءُ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْقَوِىُّ ٱلْعَزِيزُ
verses.text: God is astute with His servants, providing for whomever He pleases. He is the Strong, the Mighty.

verses.quran_arabic: مَن كَانَ يُرِيدُ حَرْثَ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ نَزِدْ لَهُۥ فِى حَرْثِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن كَانَ يُرِيدُ حَرْثَ ٱلدُّنْيَا نُؤْتِهِۦ مِنْهَا وَمَا لَهُۥ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ مِن نَّصِيبٍ
verses.text: Whoever desires the harvest of the Hereafter – We shall give him increase in his harvest, and whoever desires the harvest of this world – We shall give him some of it, but he will not have any portion in the Hereafter.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَٰٓؤُا۟ شَرَعُوا۟ لَهُم مِّنَ ٱلدِّينِ مَا لَمْ يَأْذَنۢ بِهِ ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَلَوْلَا كَلِمَةُ ٱلْفَصْلِ لَقُضِىَ بَيْنَهُمْ ۗ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: Or do they have associates who have instituted for them from the religion what God has not given permission for? Were it not for a decisive word, it would indeed have been decided between them. Surely the evildoers – for them (there is) a painful punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: تَرَى ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ مُشْفِقِينَ مِمَّا كَسَبُوا۟ وَهُوَ وَاقِعٌۢ بِهِمْ ۗ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ فِى رَوْضَاتِ ٱلْجَنَّاتِ ۖ لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَضْلُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
verses.text: You will see the evildoers apprehensive about what they have earned, when it falls on them, while those who believe and do righteous deeds are in meadows of the Gardens. They will have whatever they please in the presence of their Lord. That is the great favor!

verses.quran_arabic: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلَّذِى يُبَشِّرُ ٱللَّهُ عِبَادَهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ ۗ قُل لَّآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ أَجْرًا إِلَّا ٱلْمَوَدَّةَ فِى ٱلْقُرْبَىٰ ۗ وَمَن يَقْتَرِفْ حَسَنَةًۭ نَّزِدْ لَهُۥ فِيهَا حُسْنًا ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌۭ شَكُورٌ
verses.text: That is the good news which God gives to His servants who believe and do righteous deeds. Say: ‘I do not ask you for any reward for it, except love for family.’ Whoever acquires a good (deed) – We shall increase the good for him in it. Surely God is forgiving, thankful.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًۭا ۖ فَإِن يَشَإِ ٱللَّهُ يَخْتِمْ عَلَىٰ قَلْبِكَ ۗ وَيَمْحُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْبَٰطِلَ وَيُحِقُّ ٱلْحَقَّ بِكَلِمَٰتِهِۦٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: Or do they say, ‘He has forged a lie against God?’ If God pleases, He will set a seal on your heart, and God will blot out falsehood and verify the truth by His words. Surely He knows what is in the hearts.

verses.quran_arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى يَقْبَلُ ٱلتَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعْفُوا۟ عَنِ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: He (it is) who accepts repentance from His servants and pardons evil deeds. He knows what you do.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَهۡوَ اَ۬لَّذِي يَقۡبَلُ اُ۬لتَّوۡبَةَ عَنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعۡفُواْ عَنِ اِ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what they do;

canonical_variants.arabic: وَهۡوَ اَ۬لَّذِي يَقۡبَلُ اُ۬لتَّوۡبَةَ عَنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعۡفُواْ عَنِ اِ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ  وَيَعۡلَم مَّا يَفۡعَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what they do;

canonical_variants.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي يَقۡبَلُ ٱلتَّوۡبَةَ عَنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعۡفُواْ عَنِ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what they do;

canonical_variants.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي يَقۡبَلُ ٱلتَّوۡبَةَ عَنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعۡفُواْ عَنِ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا تَفۡعَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what youpl dob;

canonical_variants.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي يَقۡبَلُ ٱلتَّوۡبَةَ عَنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعۡفُواْ عَنِ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what they do;

canonical_variants.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي يَقۡبَلُ ٱلتَّوۡبَةَ عَنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعۡفُواْ عَنِ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what they do;

canonical_variants.arabic: وَهْوَ اَ۬لذِے يَقْبَلُ اُ۬لتَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعْفُواْ عَنِ اِ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا يَفْعَلُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what they do;

canonical_variants.arabic: وَهُوَ اَ۬لذِے يَقْبَلُ اُ۬لتَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعْفُواْ عَنِ اِ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا يَفْعَلُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what they do;

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَسْتَجِيبُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَيَزِيدُهُم مِّن فَضْلِهِۦ ۚ وَٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌۭ شَدِيدٌۭ
verses.text: He responds to those who believe and do righteous deeds, and gives them increase from His favor. But the disbelievers – for them (there is) a harsh punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَلَوْ بَسَطَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلرِّزْقَ لِعِبَادِهِۦ لَبَغَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَٰكِن يُنَزِّلُ بِقَدَرٍۢ مَّا يَشَآءُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِعِبَادِهِۦ خَبِيرٌۢ بَصِيرٌۭ
verses.text: If God were to extend (His) provision to His servants, they would indeed act oppressively on the earth, but He sends down in measure whatever He pleases. Surely He is aware of His servants (and) sees (them).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَوۡ بَسَطَ اَ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لرِّزۡقَ لِعِبَادِهِۦ لَبَغَوۡاْ فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِ وَلَٰكِن يُنزِلُ بِقَدَرٖ مَّا يَشَآءُۚ اِ۪نَّهُۥ بِعِبَادِهِۦ خَبِيرُۢ بَصِيرٞ
canonical_variants.english: And if Allah were to extend provision for His servants, they would oppress (others) on earth, but He sends down in precise measure whatever He wills; indeed, regarding His servants, He is All-Aware, All-Seeing.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَوۡ بَسَطَ اَ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لرِّزۡقَ لِعِبَادِهِۦ لَبَغَوۡاْ فِي اِ۬لۡأَرۡضِ  وَلَٰكِن يُنزِلُ بِقَدَرٖ مَّا يَشَآءُۚ اِ۪نَّهُۥ بِعِبَادِهِۦ خَبِيرُۢ بَصِيرٞ
canonical_variants.english: And if Allah were to extend provision for His servants, they would oppress (others) on earth, but He sends down in precise measure whatever He wills; indeed, regarding His servants, He is All-Aware, All-Seeing.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَلَوۡ بَسَطَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلرِّزۡقَ لِعِبَادِهِۦ لَبَغَوۡاْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَٰكِن يُنزِلُ بِقَدَرٖ مَّا يَشَآءُۚ اِ۪نَّهُۥ بِعِبَادِهِۦ خَبِيرُۢ بَصِيرٞ
canonical_variants.english: And if Allah were to extend provision for His servants, they would oppress (others) on earth, but He sends down in precise measure whatever He wills; indeed, regarding His servants, He is All-Aware, All-Seeing.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَلَوۡ بَسَطَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلرِّزۡقَ لِعِبَادِهِۦ لَبَغَوۡاْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَٰكِن يُنزِلُ بِقَدَرٖ مَّا يَشَآءُۚ اِ۪نَّهُۥ بِعِبَادِهِۦ خَبِيرُۢ بَصِيرٞ
canonical_variants.english: And if Allah were to extend provision for His servants, they would oppress (others) on earth, but He sends down in precise measure whatever He wills; indeed, regarding His servants, He is All-Aware, All-Seeing.

verses.quran_arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُنَزِّلُ ٱلْغَيْثَ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا قَنَطُوا۟ وَيَنشُرُ رَحْمَتَهُۥ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْوَلِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ
verses.text: He (it is) who sends down the rain after they have despaired, and displays His mercy. He is the Ally, the Praiseworthy.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَهۡوَ اَ۬لَّذِي يُنزِلُ اُ۬لۡغَيۡثَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا قَنَطُواْ وَيَنشُرُ رَحۡمَتَهُۥۚ وَهۡوَ اَ۬لۡوَلِيُّ اُ۬لۡحَمِيدُ
canonical_variants.english: And it is He who sends down rain after they have despaired, and unfolds His mercy, and it is He Who is the Ultimate Guardian, the Praiseworthy.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَهۡوَ اَ۬لَّذِي  يُنزِلُ اُ۬لۡغَيۡثَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا قَنَطُواْ وَيَنشُر رَّحۡمَتَهُۥۚ وَهۡوَ اَ۬لۡوَلِيُّ اُ۬لۡحَمِيدُ
canonical_variants.english: And it is He who sends down rain after they have despaired, and unfolds His mercy, and it is He Who is the Ultimate Guardian, the Praiseworthy.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُنزِلُ ٱلۡغَيۡثَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا قَنَطُواْ وَيَنشُرُ رَحۡمَتَهُۥۚ وَهُوَ ٱلۡوَلِيُّ ٱلۡحَمِيدُ
canonical_variants.english: And it is He who sends down rain after they have despaired, and unfolds His mercy, and it is He Who is the Ultimate Guardian, the Praiseworthy.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُنزِلُ ٱلۡغَيۡثَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا قَنَطُواْ وَيَنشُرُ رَحۡمَتَهُۥۚ وَهُوَ ٱلۡوَلِيُّ ٱلۡحَمِيدُ
canonical_variants.english: And it is He who sends down rain after they have despaired, and unfolds His mercy, and it is He Who is the Ultimate Guardian, the Praiseworthy.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمِنْ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ خَلْقُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَثَّ فِيهِمَا مِن دَآبَّةٍۢ ۚ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ جَمْعِهِمْ إِذَا يَشَآءُ قَدِيرٌۭ
verses.text: Among His signs are the creation of the heavens and the earth, and the creatures He has scattered in both of them. He has power over gathering them whenever He pleases.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَآ أَصَٰبَكُم مِّن مُّصِيبَةٍۢ فَبِمَا كَسَبَتْ أَيْدِيكُمْ وَيَعْفُوا۟ عَن كَثِيرٍۢ
verses.text: Whatever smiting may smite you is because of what your (own) hands have earned – yet He pardons much.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَآ أَنتُم بِمُعْجِزِينَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَمَا لَكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مِن وَلِىٍّۢ وَلَا نَصِيرٍۢ
verses.text: You cannot escape (Him) on the earth, and you have no ally and no helper other than God.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمِنْ ءَايَٰتِهِ ٱلْجَوَارِ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ كَٱلْأَعْلَٰمِ
verses.text: Among His signs are the (ships) running on the sea, like landmarks.

verses.quran_arabic: إِن يَشَأْ يُسْكِنِ ٱلرِّيحَ فَيَظْلَلْنَ رَوَاكِدَ عَلَىٰ ظَهْرِهِۦٓ ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَٰتٍۢ لِّكُلِّ صَبَّارٍۢ شَكُورٍ
verses.text: If He pleases, He stills the wind and they remain motionless on its surface. Surely in that are signs indeed for every patient (and) thankful one.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمِنْ ءَايَٰتِهِ اِ۬لْجَوَارِۦ فِے اِ۬لْبَحْرِ كَالْأَعْلَٰمِۖ إِنْ يَّشَأْ يُسْكِنِ اِ۬لرِّيَٰحَ فَيَظْلَلْنَ رَوَاكِدَ عَلَىٰ ظَهْرِهِۦ إِنَّ فِے ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّكُلِّ صَبَّارٖ شَكُورٍ
canonical_variants.english: If He wills, He can still the winds, leaving them motionless on its surface; indeed, in that are signs for everyone who is most patient, constantly thankful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمِنَ اٰيَٰتِهِ اِ۬لْجَوَارِۦ فِے اِ۬لْبَحْرِ كَالَاعْلَٰمِۖ إِنْ يَّشَأْ يُسْكِنِ اِ۬لرِّيَٰحَ فَيَظْلَلْنَ رَوَاكِدَ عَلَىٰ ظَهْرِهِۦٓ إِنَّ فِے ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّكُلِّ صَبّ۪ارٖ شَكُورٍ
canonical_variants.english: If He wills, He can still the winds, leaving them motionless on its surface; indeed, in that are signs for everyone who is most patient, constantly thankful.

verses.quran_arabic: أَوْ يُوبِقْهُنَّ بِمَا كَسَبُوا۟ وَيَعْفُ عَن كَثِيرٍۢ
verses.text: Or He wrecks them for what they have earned – yet He pardons much –

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَعْلَمَ ٱلَّذِينَ يُجَٰدِلُونَ فِىٓ ءَايَٰتِنَا مَا لَهُم مِّن مَّحِيصٍۢ
verses.text: and (it is so that) He may know those who dispute about Our signs. For them (there is) no place of escape.

verses.quran_arabic: فَمَآ أُوتِيتُم مِّن شَىْءٍۢ فَمَتَٰعُ ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَمَا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ خَيْرٌۭ وَأَبْقَىٰ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ
verses.text: Whatever things you have been given are (only) the enjoyment of this present life, but what is with God is better and more lasting for those who believe and put their trust in their Lord

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبَٰٓئِرَ ٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْفَوَٰحِشَ وَإِذَا مَا غَضِبُوا۟ هُمْ يَغْفِرُونَ
verses.text: – and (also for) those who avoid great sins and immoral deeds, and when they are angry, they forgive,

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱسْتَجَابُوا۟ لِرَبِّهِمْ وَأَقَامُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَأَمْرُهُمْ شُورَىٰ بَيْنَهُمْ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَٰهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ
verses.text: and those who respond to their Lord and observe the prayer, and their affair (is a matter of) consultation among themselves, and they contribute from what We have provided them,

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ إِذَآ أَصَابَهُمُ ٱلْبَغْىُ هُمْ يَنتَصِرُونَ
verses.text: and those who, when envy smites them, defend themselves (against it).

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَزَٰٓؤُا۟ سَيِّئَةٍۢ سَيِّئَةٌۭ مِّثْلُهَا ۖ فَمَنْ عَفَا وَأَصْلَحَ فَأَجْرُهُۥ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: (The) payment for an evil deed is an evil like it, but whoever pardons and sets (things) right – his reward (depends) on God. Surely He does not love the evildoers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَمَنِ ٱنتَصَرَ بَعْدَ ظُلْمِهِۦ فَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ مَا عَلَيْهِم مِّن سَبِيلٍ
verses.text: Whoever indeed defends himself after he has suffered evil, those – against them (there is) no way.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّمَا ٱلسَّبِيلُ عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ يَظْلِمُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ وَيَبْغُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بِغَيْرِ ٱلْحَقِّ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: The way is only open against those who do the people evil, and act oppressively on the earth without any right. Those – for them (there is) a painful punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَمَن صَبَرَ وَغَفَرَ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمِنْ عَزْمِ ٱلْأُمُورِ
verses.text: But whoever indeed is patient and forgives – surely that indeed is one of the determining factors in (all) affairs.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَن يُضْلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن وَلِىٍّۢ مِّنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ ۗ وَتَرَى ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ لَمَّا رَأَوُا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ يَقُولُونَ هَلْ إِلَىٰ مَرَدٍّۢ مِّن سَبِيلٍۢ
verses.text: Whoever God leads astray has no ally after Him, and you will see the evildoers, when they see the punishment, saying, ‘(Is there) any way to return?’

verses.quran_arabic: وَتَرَىٰهُمْ يُعْرَضُونَ عَلَيْهَا خَٰشِعِينَ مِنَ ٱلذُّلِّ يَنظُرُونَ مِن طَرْفٍ خَفِىٍّۢ ۗ وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِنَّ ٱلْخَٰسِرِينَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَأَهْلِيهِمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ ۗ أَلَآ إِنَّ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ فِى عَذَابٍۢ مُّقِيمٍۢ
verses.text: You will see them presented to it, humbled by the disgrace, looking with furtive glance(s). And those who believe will say, ‘Surely the losers are those who have lost their (own) selves and their families on the Day of Resurrection.’ Is it not a fact that the evildoers (will remain) in lasting punishment?

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا كَانَ لَهُم مِّنْ أَوْلِيَآءَ يَنصُرُونَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ۗ وَمَن يُضْلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن سَبِيلٍ
verses.text: They will have no allies to help them, other than God, and whoever God leads astray has no way.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱسْتَجِيبُوا۟ لِرَبِّكُم مِّن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِىَ يَوْمٌۭ لَّا مَرَدَّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ مَا لَكُم مِّن مَّلْجَإٍۢ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ وَمَا لَكُم مِّن نَّكِيرٍۢ
verses.text: Respond to your Lord, before a Day comes from God which cannot be turned back. You will not have any shelter on that Day, nor any denial (of what you have done).

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِنْ أَعْرَضُوا۟ فَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَٰكَ عَلَيْهِمْ حَفِيظًا ۖ إِنْ عَلَيْكَ إِلَّا ٱلْبَلَٰغُ ۗ وَإِنَّآ إِذَآ أَذَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ مِنَّا رَحْمَةًۭ فَرِحَ بِهَا ۖ وَإِن تُصِبْهُمْ سَيِّئَةٌۢ بِمَا قَدَّمَتْ أَيْدِيهِمْ فَإِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ كَفُورٌۭ
verses.text: If they turn away – We have not sent you as a watcher over them. Nothing (depends) on you except the delivery (of the message). Surely We – when We give a person a taste of mercy from Us, he gloats about it, but if some evil smites them because of what their (own) hands have sent forward – surely the human is ungrateful.

verses.quran_arabic: لِّلَّهِ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ يَخْلُقُ مَا يَشَآءُ ۚ يَهَبُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ إِنَٰثًۭا وَيَهَبُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ ٱلذُّكُورَ
verses.text: To God (belongs) the kingdom of the heavens and the earth. He creates whatever He pleases. He grants females to whomever He pleases, and He grants males to whomever He pleases,

verses.quran_arabic: أَوْ يُزَوِّجُهُمْ ذُكْرَانًۭا وَإِنَٰثًۭا ۖ وَيَجْعَلُ مَن يَشَآءُ عَقِيمًا ۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمٌۭ قَدِيرٌۭ
verses.text: or He pairs them males and females. He makes barren whomever He pleases. Surely He is knowing, powerful.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَمَا كَانَ لِبَشَرٍ أَن يُكَلِّمَهُ ٱللَّهُ إِلَّا وَحْيًا أَوْ مِن وَرَآئِ حِجَابٍ أَوْ يُرْسِلَ رَسُولًۭا فَيُوحِىَ بِإِذْنِهِۦ مَا يَشَآءُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِىٌّ حَكِيمٌۭ
verses.text: It is not (fitting) for any human being that God should speak to him, except (by) inspiration, or from behind a veil, or (that) He should send a messenger and he inspire by His permission whatever He pleases. Surely He is most high, wise.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَمَا كَانَ لِبَشَرٍ أَنْ يُّكَلِّمَهُ اُ۬للَّهُ إِلَّا وَحْياً أَوْ مِنْ وَّرَآءِےْ حِجَابٍ أَوْ يُرْسِلُ رَسُولاٗ فَيُوحِے بِإِذْنِهِۦ مَا يَشَآءُۖ اِ۪نَّهُۥ عَلِيٌّ حَكِيمٞۖ
canonical_variants.english: And it is not for any human that Allah should speak to him except by revelation or from behind a veil, or He sends a messenger then reveals to him by His permission whatever He wills; indeed, He is All-High, All-Wise.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَمَا كَانَ لِبَشَرٍ اَنْ يُّكَلِّمَهُ اُ۬للَّهُ إِلَّا وَحْياً اَوْ مِنْ وَّرَآءِےْ حِجَابٍ اَوْ يُرْسِلُ رَسُولاٗ فَيُوحِے بِإِذْنِهِۦ مَا يَشَآءُۖ اِ۪نَّهُۥ عَلِيٌّ حَكِيمٞۖ
canonical_variants.english: And it is not for any human that Allah should speak to him except by revelation or from behind a veil, or He sends a messenger then reveals to him by His permission whatever He wills; indeed, He is All-High, All-Wise.

verses.quran_arabic: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْكَ رُوحًۭا مِّنْ أَمْرِنَا ۚ مَا كُنتَ تَدْرِى مَا ٱلْكِتَٰبُ وَلَا ٱلْإِيمَٰنُ وَلَٰكِن جَعَلْنَٰهُ نُورًۭا نَّهْدِى بِهِۦ مَن نَّشَآءُ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ۚ وَإِنَّكَ لَتَهْدِىٓ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍۢ مُّسْتَقِيمٍۢ
verses.text: In this way We have inspired you (with) a spirit of Our command. You did not know what the Book was, nor (what) belief (was), but We have made it a light by means of which We guide whomever We please of Our servants. Surely you will guide (people) to a straight path,

verses.quran_arabic: صِرَٰطِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ أَلَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ تَصِيرُ ٱلْأُمُورُ
verses.text: the path of God, the One to whom (belongs) whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Is it not a fact that all affairs are returned to God?
